changes.before:
<mujoco model="three_wheeler">
  <option timestep="0.005" gravity="0 0 -9.81"/>

  <asset>
    <texture type="skybox" builtin="gradient" rgb1="0.6 0.8 1.0" rgb2="0.1 0.2 0.4" width="512" height="512"/>
    <texture name="grid" type="2d" builtin="checker" rgb1="0.8 0.8 0.8" rgb2="0.6 0.6 0.6" width="512" height="512"/>
    <material name="grid_mat" texture="grid" texrepeat="4 4" reflectance="0.1"/>
    <material name="chassis_mat" rgba="0.2 0.5 0.9 1"/>
    <material name="wheel_mat" rgba="0.15 0.15 0.15 1"/>
    <material name="axle_mat" rgba="0.6 0.6 0.6 1"/>
  </asset>

  <worldbody>
    <light name="sun" pos="0 0 8" dir="0 0 -1" diffuse="1 1 1" specular="0.3 0.3 0.3" castshadow="true"/>
    <geom name="ground" type="plane" size="50 50 0.1" material="grid_mat" friction="1.2 0.005 0.0001"/>

    <body name="chassis" pos="0 0 0.35">
      <freejoint name="chassis_free"/>
      <geom name="chassis_body" type="box" size="0.5 0.3 0.1" material="chassis_mat" mass="8"/>
      <!-- Front single wheel mount -->
      <geom name="front_strut" type="cylinder" size="0.03 0.18" pos="0.35 0 -0.1" euler="90 0 0" material="axle_mat" mass="0.2"/>

      <!-- Rear left wheel -->
      <body name="rear_left_wheel" pos="-0.4 0.32 -0.18">
        <joint name="rear_left_spin" type="hinge" axis="0 1 0" damping="0.3"/>
        <geom name="rear_left_geom" type="cylinder" size="0.12 0.06" euler="90 0 0" material="wheel_mat" mass="1.2" friction="1.5 0.005 0.0001"/>
      </body>

      <!-- Rear right wheel -->
      <body name="rear_right_wheel" pos="-0.4 -0.32 -0.18">
        <joint name="rear_right_spin" type="hinge" axis="0 1 0" damping="0.3"/>
        <geom name="rear_right_geom" type="cylinder" size="0.12 0.06" euler="90 0 0" material="wheel_mat" mass="1.2" friction="1.5 0.005 0.0001"/>
      </body>

      <!-- Front single wheel -->
      <body name="front_wheel" pos="0.4 0 -0.18">
        <joint name="front_spin" type="hinge" axis="0 1 0" damping="0.3"/>
        <geom name="front_geom" type="cylinder" size="0.12 0.06" euler="90 0 0" material="wheel_mat" mass="1.2" friction="1.5 0.005 0.0001"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <actuator>
    <motor name="rear_left_motor"  joint="rear_left_spin"  gear="40" ctrllimited="true" ctrlrange="-10 10"/>
    <motor name="rear_right_motor" joint="rear_right_spin" gear="40" ctrllimited="true" ctrlrange="-10 10"/>
    <motor name="front_motor"      joint="front_spin"      gear="20" ctrllimited="true" ctrlrange="-10 10"/>
  </actuator>
</mujoco>
